defaultCorrection: At 03:24, replace ‘sin⁻¹(x) = 1/sin(x)’ with ‘sin⁻¹(x) = arcsin(x)’. Do not publish until the caption, evidence, dependency proof record, and release hash checks all pass.

release.title: Inverse notation without the reciprocal trap

documents.content:
# Checked teaching note

Use inverse notation only for the inverse function: sin⁻¹(x) = arcsin(x), the inverse sine function. The reciprocal is csc(x) = 1/sin(x).

WEBVTT

00:03:19.000 --> 00:03:23.000
Now read the calculator key carefully.

00:03:23.000 --> 00:03:28.000
Remember: sin⁻¹(x) = 1/sin(x).

00:03:28.000 --> 00:03:32.000
Then compare the result with the unit circle.
